ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generation_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation unit */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the power plant */,
  "bus" INTEGER /* Bus number associated with the generation unit */,
  "Pg" REAL /* Active power generation (Pg) in MW */,
  "Qg" REAL /* Reactive power generation (Qg) in MVAR */,
  "Qmax" REAL /* Maximum reactive power output (Qmax) in MVAR */,
  "Qmin" REAL /* Minimum reactive power output (Qmin) in MVAR */,
  "Vg" REAL /* Voltage magnitude at the bus (Vg) in p.u. */,
  "MVABase" REAL /* MVA base rating of the unit */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Operational status of the unit (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "Pmax" REAL /* Maximum active power output (Pmax) in MW */,
  "Pmin" REAL /* Minimum active power output (Pmin) in MW */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the unit was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the generation unit */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "operational_hours" REAL /* Total operational hours since installation */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the generation unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_units_bus FOREIGN KEY ("bus") REFERENCES power_plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generation_units_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES power_plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the power plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the plant */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the power plant in MW */,
  "commissioning_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant started operations */,
  "last_overhaul_date" TEXT /* Date of the last major overhaul */,
  "next_overhaul_due" TEXT /* Date when the next major overhaul is due */,
  "number_of_units" INTEGER /* Total number of generation units in the plant */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the generation unit serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance in hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician or team who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES generation_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_generation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the generation unit */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded generation */,
  "Pg" REAL /* Active power generation (Pg) in MW */,
  "Qg" REAL /* Reactive power generation (Qg) in MVAR */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the power generation (Hz) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature during generation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity during generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_generation_history_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES generation_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for alert */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the generation unit related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed alert message */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES generation_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
